01_initial_request.input_data: Anti-lysozyme VHH D3-L11 amino acid sequence and structure, MOE molecular modeling software for dStability score calculation
01_initial_request.user_intent: To enhance the thermal stability of the VHH antibody using a rational design approach based on Gibbs free energy change predictions, while retaining antigen binding affinity
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: Increased Melting Temperature (Tm) and maintained antigen binding affinity

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Comprehensive mutagenesis was proposed to understand the difficulty of enhancing Tm. [Gap] It was unknown if alanine or valine substitution could effectively improve Tm across all residues. [Decision] To evaluate efficiency, chose to use Inverse PCR to perform comprehensive site-directed mutagenesis (ASM and VSM) on D3-L11, expecting to obtain mutant plasmids.

parameters.conditions: pre-denaturation at 98°C for 1 min; 30 cycles of denaturation at 98°C for 10 s, annealing at 55°C for 15 s and amplification at 72°C for 55 s

02_agent_trajectory.observation: DNA sequences of 39 ASMs and 9 VSMs could not be confirmed. Remaining 76 ASMs and 26 VSMs were successfully constructed.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Mutant plasmids were constructed. [Gap] Protein needed to be produced for stability testing. [Decision] To obtain protein samples, chose to use ExpiCHO Expression System to perform transient transfection and purification on D3-L11 mutants, expecting to obtain purified VHH proteins.

parameters.elution_buffer: 20 mM Tris/HCl pH 7.5, 500 mM NaCl, 500 mM imidazole

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Purified protein concentrations of 26 ASMs and 9 VSMs were below 0.35 mg/mL. Remaining 50 ASMs and 17 VSMs were highly expressed.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Proteins were purified. [Gap] Thermal stability needed to be measured. [Decision] To evaluate Tm, chose to use CFX384 Touch Real-Time PCR systems to perform Differential Scanning Fluorometry (DSF) on D3-L11 mutants, expecting to obtain Tm values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Only 5 ASMs and 3 VSMs showed an increase in Tm by more than 2°C. Only one ASM showed increase > 5°C. Comprehensive mutagenesis concluded as not effective.

references.relevance: Reference for high-throughput thermal scanning method

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Comprehensive mutagenesis was inefficient. [Gap] A rational approach was needed to identify stabilizing mutations. [Decision] To predict stability changes, chose to use MOE molecular modeling software to calculate dStability scores for all 2375 single mutants of D3-L11, expecting to identify mutations with low dStability scores.

parameters.mutations: 125 residues mutated into 19 different amino acids (2,375 total)

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Selected five mutations (A24L, G26I, A79F, G97F, G118F) with the lowest dStability scores for first-round experimental validation.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Five mutations were selected computationally. [Gap] Mutant DNA needed to be generated. [Decision] To create mutants, chose to use Inverse PCR to perform site-directed mutagenesis on D3-L11, expecting to obtain expression plasmids for the 5 selected mutants.

parameters.conditions: pre-denaturation at 98°C for 1 min; 30 cycles of denaturation at 98°C for 10 s, annealing at 55°C for 15 s and amplification at 72°C for 55 s

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Failed to make expression plasmid of G118F. Successfully expressed and purified remaining 4 mutants.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Plasmids were constructed. [Gap] Protein needed for stability and affinity testing. [Decision] To produce protein, chose to use ExpiCHO Expression System to perform transient transfection and purification on Round 1 mutants, expecting to obtain purified VHH proteins.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Successfully expressed and purified 4 mutants (A24L, G26I, A79F, G97F).

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Round 1 mutants were purified. [Gap] Thermal stability needed to be measured. [Decision] To evaluate Tm, chose to use CFX384 Touch Real-Time PCR systems to perform DSF on Round 1 mutants, expecting to obtain Tm values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: 3 mutants (A24L, G26I, A79F) showed enhanced Tm. A79F increased Tm by more than 5°C. G97F showed decreased Tm.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Tm was measured for Round 1 mutants. [Gap] Antigen binding affinity needed to be assessed. [Decision] To measure affinity, chose to use Biacore T200 to perform Surface Plasmon Resonance (SPR) on Round 1 mutants, expecting to obtain KD values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Affinity was attenuated in all four mutants. A79F showed greater decrease in affinity than G97F.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] SPR data was collected. [Gap] Additional affinity validation was needed. [Decision] To measure affinity, chose to use Infinite M200pro to perform ELISA on Round 1 mutants, expecting to obtain EC50 values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Affinity was attenuated in all four mutants, consistent with SPR results.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] A79F showed the most improved Tm (>5°C). [Gap] Optimal amino acid at position 79 was unknown. [Decision] To optimize position 79, chose to use MOE molecular modeling software to calculate dStability scores for all A79 series mutations, expecting to identify mutations with low dStability scores.

parameters.mutations: A79 mutated into all other amino acids

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Selected A79 residue for second-round mutagenesis into all other amino acids.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] A79 series was selected for Round 2. [Gap] Mutant DNA needed to be generated. [Decision] To create mutants, chose to use Inverse PCR to perform site-directed mutagenesis on A79 residue, expecting to obtain expression plasmids for A79 series mutants.

parameters.conditions: pre-denaturation at 98°C for 1 min; 30 cycles of denaturation at 98°C for 10 s, annealing at 55°C for 15 s and amplification at 72°C for 55 s
parameters.target_mutants: A79 mutated to 18 other amino acids

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Failed to construct plasmids of A79G and A79D. Successfully expressed and purified 14 mutants.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] A79 series plasmids were constructed. [Gap] Protein needed for stability and affinity testing. [Decision] To produce protein, chose to use ExpiCHO Expression System to perform transient transfection and purification on Round 2 mutants, expecting to obtain purified VHH proteins.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Successfully expressed and purified 14 mutants (V, W, I, L, C, N, Q, E, H, R, K, P, S, T at A79).

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Round 2 mutants were purified. [Gap] Thermal stability needed to be measured. [Decision] To evaluate Tm, chose to use CFX384 Touch Real-Time PCR systems to perform DSF on Round 2 mutants, expecting to obtain Tm values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Four mutations (A79I, A79W, A79Y, A79C) increased Tm by more than 5°C. Pearson's correlation coefficient between Tm and dStability was -0.64.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Tm was measured for Round 2 mutants. [Gap] Antigen binding affinity needed to be assessed. [Decision] To measure affinity, chose to use Biacore T200 to perform Surface Plasmon Resonance (SPR) on Round 2 mutants, expecting to obtain KD values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: A79I mutant showed only a 1.6-fold reduction in affinity. All A79 mutants showed less than ten-fold decrease in affinity.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] SPR data was collected. [Gap] Additional affinity validation was needed. [Decision] To measure affinity, chose to use Infinite M200pro to perform ELISA on Round 2 mutants, expecting to obtain EC50 values.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: A79I mutant completely retained its EC50 value. I, L, V, M, N and S mutants showed less than ten-fold decrease in affinity.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Experimental data was collected. [Gap] Structural basis for stability and affinity changes was unknown. [Decision] To investigate structural changes, chose to use MOE Antibody Modeler to build 3D structural models of mutants, expecting to obtain model structures for comparison.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Model structures classified into two clusters (class-1 and class-2). Class-2 mutants showed improved Tm more often, while class-1 maintained affinity better.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] 3D models were built. [Gap] Local structural features needed annotation. [Decision] To analyze structural features, chose to use JOY to annotate protein sequence alignments with 3D structural features, expecting to identify distinct structural changes.

parameters.features: solvent accessibility, secondary structure, main-chain conformation, hydrogen bond

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Local structural features were similar for all structures. No distinguishing features observed between class-1 and class-2.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Structural features were analyzed. [Gap] Interaction with antigen needed simulation. [Decision] To simulate binding, chose to use FRODOCK to perform docking simulations between VHH models and lysozyme, expecting to obtain docking poses and interaction scores.

parameters.input: Model structures of VHH and crystal structure of lysozyme
parameters.settings: default setting in the distributed script
parameters.selection: docking pose with the highest score

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Docking poses of all mutants and wild type were similar. Docking study was not useful for interpreting experimental results.

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Differential Scanning Fluorometry (DSF), Surface Plasmon Resonance (SPR), Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA)

Tm_increase.interpretation: A79I mutant showed an increase in Tm by more than 5°C compared to wild type.

Affinity_change_SPR.interpretation: A79I mutant showed only a 1.6-fold reduction in affinity (KD) using SPR.

Affinity_change_ELISA.interpretation: A79I mutant completely retained its EC50 value using ELISA.

03_success_verification.final_verdict: The research objective was achieved. The two-round rational approach using dStability score successfully identified the A79I mutant which increased Tm by more than 5°C while almost maintaining antigen binding affinity.
